data.raceComments: {"comment":"5. STRATAFY has finished in the money in both of her last two runs, the latest when second of 12 after having raced wide without cover over 1000m at Gosford. Drops 1.5kg in weight and rates well as a leading chance. 6. BONDASONG finished a close-up fourth of seven last time out over 1250m at Newcastle after coming from last into the turn. Well worth an each-way ticket. 2. HARRY THE THIEF resumed from a spell last start and made it two wins from as many starts when scoring over 1000m at Sapphire Coast after coming from last into the turn. Has a tough draw to overcome but looks a nice type and can't be discounted.","runners":[5,6,2],"exclusive":true}

extraMarkets.name: WYONG-R7-Fav Out
